title: The Media: A Cornerstone of Democracy
topic: The Role of Media in Democracy

questions.sentence: The media plays an indispensable and multifaceted role in the functioning of a healthy democracy.
One of the primary functions of the media is to report news accurately and impartially.
Beyond merely reporting, the media also facilitates public debate by presenting diverse viewpoints on complex societal issues.
However, the role of media in democracy is not without its significant challenges, especially in the rapidly evolving digital age.
The proliferation of misinformation and disinformation, often spread rapidly through social media platforms, poses a significant threat to informed public discourse.

Ultimately, a robust, responsible, and diverse media landscape, coupled with an engaged and discerning public, remains absolutely essential for preserving and strengthening democratic institutions globally.
